title: Comparison criteria matrix
description: A weighted technology/approach comparison: criteria with weights, options scored per criterion with a fit rating, and a derived verdict. Mirrors architecture/technology-comparison.md.

id.description: Optional identifier for the comparison (e.g. CMP-001 or a free label).

criteria.description: The evaluation criteria and their relative weights.

weight.description: Relative importance. Convention: weights across criteria sum to 1.0 (or use a consistent 1-5 scale).

options.description: The candidate options, each scored against every criterion.

criterion.description: Criterion id or name this score applies to.

score.description: Raw score on the chosen scale.

fit.description: Qualitative fit of the option against this criterion.

weighted_total.description: Derived weighted sum across criteria. Reproducible from scores x weights.

verdict.description: The recommended option and the gist of why.

source.description: Provenance / evidence basis for the scores.
